mission.title: thanos: [Query Frontend] support flag `--web.external-url`
mission.description: [Query Frontend] support flag `--web.external-url`. Requested by 11+ users.

steps.title: Check current thanos deployment
steps.description:
Verify your thanos version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n thanos -l app.kubernetes.io/name=thanos
helm list -n thanos 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working thanos installation.

steps.title: Review thanos configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant thanos configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n thanos -l app.kubernetes.io/name=thanos
kubectl get configmap -n thanos -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=thanos
```
### Is your proposal related to a problem?

I know there was already an request before https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/issues/364, but I don't think it was resolved completely and it may worth another try (because this is quite a stable feature

steps.title: Apply the fix for [Query Frontend] support flag `--web.external-url`
steps.description:
I believe this was fixed by https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/4847. I can't reproduce this neither in Query UI, neither in the Ruler UI. Do you also see this problem in the Query UI (not on query-frontend)?
```yaml
http://localhost:10902/graph?g0.expr=(count%20by%20(namespace%2C%20service)%20(avg_over_time(up%7Bjob%3D%22kube-prometheus-stack-alertmanager%22%2Cnamespace%3D%22monitoring%22%7D%5B5m%5D)%20%3C%200.5)%20%2F%20count%20by%20(namespace%2C%20service)%20(up%7Bjob%3D%22kube-prometheus-stack-alertmanager%22%2Cnamespace%3D%22monitoring%22%7D))%20%3E%3D%200.5&g0.tab=1&g0.stacked=0&g0.range_input=1h
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n thanos -l app.kubernetes.io/name=thanos
kubectl get events -n thanos --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "[Query Frontend] support flag `--web.external-url`" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: I believe this was fixed by https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/4847. I can't reproduce this neither in Query UI, neither in the Ruler UI. Do you also see this problem in the Query UI (not on query-frontend)?

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with thanos installed or the issue environment reproducible.
